calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta Norris;
Clerk:P. Dias/R.Goulding; Reporter: Loretta Najera
Heather Lynn Dawkins, petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the Petition for Decree Changing Name to Dechen H.L. Dawkins. Decree signed in open court.
